_comment: Per-layer eval baseline (idea 4). `detection` and `decision` each list case ids whose CURRENT output does not match ground truth — the honest, version-controlled 'here is exactly what we currently miss' disclosure, surfaced by `mati eval`. The eval gate asserts each layer's failing set equals its list exactly: a NEW miss fails CI (regression), and a newly-FIXED gap also fails (so the baseline must be updated, ratcheting recall up). The grep pattern-vs-path gap was closed by the quote-aware tokenizer; the remaining detection gaps need multi-path support (multi-file cat) or wrapper-flag parsing (sudo with flags). The decision layer is exact (no gaps).
